info.name: Interdiscount API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the interdiscount.ch clone — a production-grade Swiss electronics e-commerce platform API built with Node.js, Express, TypeScript, MongoDB, and Redis.

Base URL: http://localhost:4010/api/v1

Supported languages: DE (default), EN, FR, IT

Test accounts:
- Admin: admin.de@interdiscount-clone.ch / Password123!
- Customer: customer.de@example.ch / Password123!
- Store Manager: manager.de@interdiscount-clone.ch / Password123!

Modules: Health, Auth, Cantons, Cities, Stores, Categories, Brands, Products, Search, Users, Addresses, Orders, Payments, Reviews, Wishlists, Coupons, Notifications, Store Management, Admin, Analytics

item.name: Health Module
item.description: API health check endpoints for monitoring server, database, Redis, and queue status

item.name: Auth Module
item.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, refresh tokens, email verification, password reset

item.name: Cantons Module
item.description: Swiss canton public listing endpoints

item.name: Cities Module
item.description: Swiss city public listing endpoints with postal code lookup

item.name: Stores Module
item.description: Public store listing, detail, and geo-search endpoints for 164+ Swiss retail stores

item.name: Categories Module
item.description: Product category tree with 1,126 categories across 5 levels. Supports tree view, breadcrumb, and children listing

item.name: Brands Module
item.description: Product brand listing with 647 brands. Filterable and sortable

item.name: Products Module
item.description: Product catalog with 3,035 electronics products. Rich filtering by category, brand, price, availability, and more

item.name: Search Module
item.description: Full-text product search with autocomplete suggestions and filter options

item.name: Users Module (Profile)
item.description: Customer profile management: view/update profile, change password, upload/remove avatar

item.name: Addresses Module
item.description: Customer delivery/billing address management with Swiss postal code validation

item.name: Orders Module
item.description: Customer order management: place orders (delivery/pickup), list, detail, cancel, and return

item.name: Payments Module
item.description: Payment processing: initiate, check status, simulate payments. Supports card (Stripe), TWINT, PostFinance, invoice

item.name: Reviews Module
item.description: Customer product review management: create, list, update, delete reviews

body.raw:
{
  "product_id": "69a079537808ec1bb7917455",
  "rating": 5,
  "title": "Ausgezeichnetes Produkt!",
  "comment": "Sehr zufrieden mit der Qualität und dem schnellen Versand. Würde es jederzeit wieder kaufen.",
  "language": "de"
}

item.name: Wishlists Module
item.description: Customer product wishlist: add, remove, list, and check if product is wishlisted

item.name: Coupons Module
item.description: Customer coupon validation and listing of available discount coupons

item.name: Notifications Module
item.description: Customer in-app notification management: list, unread count, mark read

item.name: Store Management Module
item.description: Store manager endpoints: dashboard, inventory, pickup orders, transfers, promotions, store info, and staff. Requires store_manager role and store assignment

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Weekend Special",
  "description": "10% off all TV accessories this weekend",
  "category_id": "69a079537808ec1bb7916d8e",
  "discount_type": "percentage",
  "discount_value": 10,
  "valid_from": "2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "valid_until": "2026-03-03T23:59:59.000Z",
  "is_active": true
}

item.name: Admin Module
item.description: Admin endpoints: dashboard, user/product/category/brand/store/order/review/coupon/location/rbac management, and stock transfers. Requires admin or super_admin role

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Test Product (Admin Created)",
  "name_short": "Test Product",
  "slug": "test-product-admin-created",
  "code": "prod_test_admin",

  "in_store_possible": true,
  "is_orderable": true,

item.name: Analytics Module
item.description: Analytics endpoints for admin (platform-wide) and store managers (store-level). Provides dashboard stats, revenue time series, top products/stores/categories, user growth, and recent orders
